---
name: Content suggestion
about: Suggest a topic you'd like to see covered, or a follow-up angle on an existing post
title: "[idea] <topic>"
labels: idea
---

**What would you want to read about?**

<!-- A one-paragraph description. -->

**Why is it interesting / useful?**

<!-- What would the reader walk away with? What isn't already well-covered elsewhere? -->

**Related existing posts (optional):**

<!-- Link to any posts in this repo that this would build on, or external posts that are already close. -->

---

Heads up: I don't promise to write anything — this is a personal blog, not
a content commission queue. But good prompts often become posts. If you'd
like to write something yourself as a guest post, let me know in the issue.
